nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Cargo build script for hailort-sys; conditionally runs bindgen against system <hailo/hailort.h> and links libhailort when the `hailo` feature is enabled.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Crate manifest for hailort-sys (ADR-167) — raw FFI bindings to Hailo's HailoRT C library for NPU acceleration; gated behind `hailo` feature.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: README documenting hailort-sys FFI crate and the `hailo` feature gate.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Hailort-sys crate root exposing `version_triple()` and the bindgen-generated FFI surface when the `hailo` feature is active.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for ruqu-algorithms 2.0.5 — VQE, Grover, QAOA, and surface-code error correction built atop ruqu-core.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the ruqu-algorithms crate.

nodes.name: grover.rs
nodes.summary: Grover's quantum search algorithm: optimal iteration calculation, oracle construction, and full Grover run with measurement.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruqu-algorithms crate root re-exporting grover, qaoa, surface_code, and vqe submodules.

nodes.name: qaoa.rs
nodes.summary: QAOA (Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm) for MaxCut: graph construction, mixer/cost Hamiltonian circuit builder, and full optimization run.

nodes.name: surface_code.rs
nodes.summary: Surface-code quantum error correction: stabilizer layout generation, noise injection, syndrome extraction cycles, and decoding.

nodes.name: vqe.rs
nodes.summary: Variational Quantum Eigensolver: hardware-efficient ansatz construction, energy expectation, gradient-free optimizer, plus H2 and single-Z Hamiltonians.

nodes.name: test_algorithms.rs
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration tests covering Deutsch, Grover, VQE, QAOA, and surface-code algorithms with property-based and seeded reproducibility checks.

nodes.name: latency_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion latency benchmarks for ruQu's coherence-gate decision path: gate decision, structural/shift/evidence filters, tile tick, TileZero merge.

nodes.name: memory_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion memory benchmarks: structure sizes, per-tile memory, allocation-free ops, cache efficiency, memory pool, and bandwidth.

nodes.name: mincut_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for ruvector-mincut engine: creation, edge insertion, queries, dynamic updates, and surface-code graphs.

nodes.name: scaling_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion scaling benchmarks against code distance, qubit count, tile count, density, and memory pressure.

nodes.name: syndrome_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for syndrome bitmap, buffer, delta, and pipeline throughput.

nodes.name: throughput_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion throughput benchmarks covering syndrome ingestion, gate decision, permit tokens, receipt log, worker tiles, and patch graphs.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: ruQu crate manifest — classical nervous system for quantum machines providing real-time coherence assessment via dynamic min-cut, fusion-blossom, and TileZero.

nodes.name: quantum_sim.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for the ruqu-core simulator: single/two-qubit gates, Bell state, Grover circuit, QAOA layer, expectation, measurement, and state allocation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: ruqu-core 2.0.5 manifest — pure-Rust state-vector quantum simulator with optional SIMD, parallelism (rayon), and tracing features.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: README for ruqu-core, the foundational quantum simulator crate.

nodes.name: version_triple
nodes.summary: Returns the HailoRT library version as (major, minor, revision), or None when the FFI feature is disabled.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Build-script entry that runs bindgen and emits cargo:rustc-link-lib directives for libhailort.

nodes.name: GroverConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for a Grover search: qubit count, target states, optional iteration override, seed.

nodes.name: GroverResult
nodes.summary: Outcome of running Grover: measured bitstring and amplification probability.

nodes.name: optimal_iterations
nodes.summary: Computes the optimal number of Grover iterations from qubit count and marked-state count.

nodes.name: run_grover
nodes.summary: Executes the full Grover algorithm: oracle, diffusion operator, and measurement.

nodes.name: Graph
nodes.summary: Weighted undirected graph used as the MaxCut problem instance for QAOA.

nodes.name: QaoaConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for QAOA optimisation: graph, depth p, optimizer settings, seed.

nodes.name: QaoaResult
nodes.summary: QAOA run result: optimal angles, achieved cut value, and best bitstring.

nodes.name: build_qaoa_circuit
nodes.summary: Builds the QAOA ansatz circuit alternating cost and mixer Hamiltonians.

nodes.name: run_qaoa
nodes.summary: Top-level QAOA executor: parameter optimization loop returning best cut value.

nodes.name: SurfaceCodeConfig
nodes.summary: Surface-code QEC run parameters: distance, rounds, noise rate, seed.

nodes.name: SurfaceCodeLayout
nodes.summary: Geometric layout of data and ancilla qubits for a rotated surface code.

nodes.name: run_surface_code
nodes.summary: Runs a full surface-code QEC experiment: noise injection, syndrome cycles, decoding, logical error rate.

nodes.name: VqeConfig
nodes.summary: VQE configuration: Hamiltonian, ansatz depth, optimizer settings, seed.

nodes.name: VqeResult
nodes.summary: VQE outcome: converged energy, optimal parameters, and convergence history.

nodes.name: build_ansatz
nodes.summary: Constructs a hardware-efficient parameterized ansatz circuit.

nodes.name: run_vqe
nodes.summary: Top-level VQE executor: classical parameter optimization loop minimizing energy expectation.

nodes.name: h2_hamiltonian
nodes.summary: Returns the H2 molecule Jordan-Wigner Hamiltonian used in canonical VQE benchmarks.
